name: Corn Dog
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cornmeal, flour, sugar, mustard, baking powder and salt in a bowl, mixing well.
2. Add the milk, egg and melted shortening to the dry mixture, stirring until very smooth.
3. Place the batter in a tall glass for easy dipping.
4. Thread the frankfurters onto sticks.
5. Dip each frankfurter into the cornmeal batter, ensuring it is evenly coated.
6. Heat oil in a deep fryer or heavy pot to 375°F (190°C).
7. Carefully lower the coated frankfurters into the hot oil using tongs or a spider skillet.
8. Fry for about two minutes, until golden brown.
9. Remove the corn dogs from the oil with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
